raw.objective: “the population pharmacokinetic parameters estimated might assist the clinician in the individualization of clonazepam dosing regimens”
raw.covariates: Tested: WT, Age, CLNZ dose, gender, comedication of carbamazepine or valproic acid Included: WT, comedication of CBZ or VPA on CL, WT on Vd
raw.observations: Simplified PK model does not allow absorption/distribution phases. It is unclear how to interpret the impact of more than 1 comedication due to the mathematic description.
raw.dose: Steady state oral doses in patients
raw.equations: DIF=1 if(VPA==1 & CBZ!=1) DIF=(theta14^VPA) if(CBZ==1 & VPA!=1) DIF=(theta15^CBZ) if(VPA==1 & CBZ==1) DIF=theta12*(WT^theta13) CL=theta1*(WT**theta2)*DIF*(1+eta1) Cssipred=D/(CL*Tau) Cssobs=Cssipred*(1+eps1) Css=steady state concentrations D=CLNZ dose Tau=dosing interval VPA= comedication with VPA (1=yes, 0=no) CBZ= comedication with CBZ (1=yes, 0=no)

extraction_target.title: Pharmacoepidemiologic investigation of clonazepam relative clearance by mixed-effect modeling using routine clinical pharmacokinetic data in Japanese patients.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

covariates: comedication of CBZ or VPA on CL
extraction_target.residual_error: DIF=1 if(VPA==1 & CBZ!=1) DIF=(theta14^VPA) if(CBZ==1 & VPA!=1) DIF=(theta15^CBZ) if(VPA==1 & CBZ==1) DIF=theta12*(WT^theta13) CL=theta1*(WT**theta2)*DIF*(1+eta1) Cssipred=D/(CL*Tau) Cssobs=Cssipred*(1+eps1) Css=steady state concentrations D=CLNZ dose Tau=dosing interval VPA= comedication with VPA (1=yes, 0=no) CBZ= comedication with CBZ (1=yes, 0=no)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady state oral doses in patients
study.objective: “the population pharmacokinetic parameters estimated might assist the clinician in the individualization of clonazepam dosing regimens”

tested: comedication of carbamazepine or valproic acid
included: comedication of CBZ or VPA on CL
covariates.raw: Tested: WT, Age, CLNZ dose, gender, comedication of carbamazepine or valproic acid Included: WT, comedication of CBZ or VPA on CL, WT on Vd

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
